name: AgentQL MCP
description: Extracts structured web data using natural language queries — no XPath or selectors needed. Works via Python/JS SDKs, MCP server, and REST API.

skills.name: Structured Extraction
skills.description: Queries web page elements using natural language descriptions and returns clean structured JSON — no CSS selectors needed.

skills.name: Playwright Integration
skills.description: Wraps AgentQL around Playwright browser sessions for Python and JavaScript, enabling AI-powered element interaction.

skills.name: REST API Extraction
skills.description: Fetches and parses public-facing web data from any URL via REST API without a browser session running locally.
